Custom Sportswear Manufacturing from Sialkot, Pakistan

July 1, 2026 | By FABRIOZA

When FIFA needed match balls for the World Cup, they came to Sialkot. When the Olympics needed sports equipment, they came to Sialkot. And when global clothing brands need custom sportswear manufacturing, they increasingly come to Sialkot too. At FABRIOZA, we manufacture performance athletic apparel from this world-renowned production hub — with MOQ starting at just 50 pieces.

Why Sialkot for Sportswear?

Sialkot's relationship with sports manufacturing dates back over a century. The city produces:

  • 70% of the world's hand-stitched footballs
  • Majority of international cricket equipment
  • Custom sportswear for Premier League, La Liga, and Bundesliga teams
  • Military-grade athletic gear exported worldwide

This heritage means Sialkot has the most experienced sportswear workforce on the planet — and FABRIOZA taps directly into this expertise.

Performance Fabrics We Work With

Fabric TypeCompositionBest ForProperties
Dri-Fit Polyester100% PolyesterRunning, trainingLightweight, quick-dry
Compression Blend85% Poly, 15% SpandexGym, CrossFit4-way stretch, muscle support
Bamboo PerformanceBamboo/SpandexYoga, lifestyleSoft, antibacterial, sustainable
Recycled PolyesterrPETEco brandsSustainable, moisture-wicking
Mesh PanelsPolyester meshVentilation zonesBreathable, lightweight

Sportswear Products We Manufacture

Team Jerseys

Soccer, basketball, baseball, rugby, volleyball, and cricket kits. Sublimation printing for vibrant all-over designs. Individual names and numbers included.

Gym & Activewear

Leggings, sports bras, tank tops, shorts, and gym tees. Compression fits, high-waist designs, and moisture-wicking fabrics.

Running & Cycling Apparel

Lightweight singlets, cycling jerseys, bib shorts, and arm warmers. Aerodynamic cuts with reflective details.

MMA & Combat Sports

Rash guards, fight shorts, and training gear. Durable flatlock stitching and compression fabrics.

Customization for Sportswear

  • Sublimation Printing: Unlimited colors, all-over designs
  • Heat Transfer: Names, numbers, sponsor logos
  • Embroidery: Team badges, crests, 3D logos
  • Reflective Details: Safety strips for running/cycling gear
  • Contrast Stitching: Color-accented seams for visual impact
  • Custom Zippers & Hardware: Branded pulls and functional details

Quality Standards for Athletic Wear

Sportswear must perform under stress. Our testing includes: colorfastness (wash at 60°C), stretch recovery (4-way stretch test), seam strength (20kg pull test), moisture-wicking verification, and pilling resistance (Martindale test). Every garment that leaves our factory meets international performance standards.

Manufacture Your Sportswear Line

50 pieces minimum. Performance fabrics. Professional construction. Free quote in 24 hours.
